title: filago pyramidata var. lutescens
intro: Filago pyramidata var. lutescens, also known as golden fleabane, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family. It is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant has been traditionally used to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine. Filago pyramidata var. lutescens can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in different applications.
